_comment: Gorkbot MCP Server Configuration — run 'gorkbot setup' to auto-install, or copy to ~/.config/gorkbot/mcp.json
_docs: Tools appear as mcp_<name>_<toolname>. Run /mcp reload after editing. Replace <GORKBOT_PROJECT_DIR> with absolute path.

servers.name: sequential-thinking
servers.description: Structured multi-step reasoning chains. Use for complex plans, debugging, research synthesis.

servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: File I/O within allowed directories. Replace <GORKBOT_PROJECT_DIR> with your project path.

servers.name: memory
servers.description: Persistent cross-session key-value entity graph for facts that survive restarts.

servers.name: time
servers.description: Current time and timezone lookups. pip install mcp-server-time

servers.name: fetch
servers.description: Raw HTTP fetch for any URL. pip install mcp-server-fetch

servers.name: github
servers.description: GitHub API — issues, PRs, repos, code search. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env, then set disabled:false.

servers.name: brave-search
servers.description: Brave web search API. Set BRAVE_API_KEY in .env, then set disabled:false.

servers.name: puppeteer
servers.description: Headless browser with JS rendering. Use when websites require JavaScript.

servers.name: notebooklm
servers.description: Google NotebookLM notebooks, sources, AI chat. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY. Google Drive sources need /auth notebooklm login.

servers.name: gorkbot-introspect
servers.description: Gorkbot self-introspection: live capabilities, loaded tools, active config. Linux/macOS/Android only.

servers.name: gorkbot-termux
servers.description: Termux environment management and Android system APIs. Android/Termux only.
